hero.greeting: F1 Creator • UGC Specialist • Event Host
hero.title: Where Glamour Meets the Grid
hero.description: I'm Cynthia Wanjira — blending editorial style with the thrill of Formula 1. Creating content that brings the paddock energy to your screen.

about.title: The Girl in the Paddock
bio: Hi, I'm Cynthia Wanjira — a Formula 1 content creator who brings editorial flair to the fast-paced world of motorsport. When I'm not trackside capturing the adrenaline, I'm crafting UGC that makes brands feel as thrilling as a last-lap overtake.

I believe motorsport content can be both glamorous and authentic. My work sits at the intersection of lifestyle, fashion, and the raw energy of the grid — bringing a fresh, feminine perspective to F1 content that resonates with a new generation of fans.

portfolio.title: Sunset at the Circuit

services.title: UGC Creation
services.description: Authentic, high-quality user-generated content that captures the energy of F1 and resonates with your target audience.

services.title: Event Hosting
services.description: Energetic, polished event hosting for F1 watch parties, brand activations, fan meet-ups, and motorsport events.

contact.introText: Whether you're looking for eye-catching UGC, an event host who brings the energy, or a creative partnership that stands out — let's make it happen.
